title: Power Armor
description: Adds a fully functional power armor system inspired by the Fallout series!
body:
**This datapack introduces a fully functional Power Armor system!** The recipes for all items added by this datapack can be viewed in the recipe book inside the crafting table. Alternativly, all items can also be obtained via the give commands: `/function give:[item_name]`. Power Armor is a special type of armor that cannot be worn like traditional armor. Instead, you must first craft a Power Armor Frame and then place it on the ground. Once placed, you will need to power it. Add power to the suit by right-clicking with redstone blocks on the back. Once you do this, you can enter the suit by right-clicking on the back. To get the most out of Power Armor, you will need to craft individual pieces of power armor. There are multiple different pieces of Power Armor you can craft, some are more powerful than others. Whichever piece you choose to craft, each armor piece you add will further boost your stats. To customize your armor even further, you can add any vanilla or modded armor trims to give your Power Armor extra flair. When you want to exit the power armor, simply look straight down and sneak. Alternatively, when you die, your power armor will be placed on the spot where you died. Any unused redstone power left in the suit will remain until your next use. *Obviously, this Power Armor system is inspired by the Fallout series of games, with inspiration taken mostly from [Fallout 4](https://store.steampowered.com/app/377160/Fallout_4/) and [Fallout 76](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1151340/Fallout_76/).* > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server?
